title: NOD-MEG

funding_references.funder_name: National Natural Science Foundation of China
National Natural Science Foundation of China
Ministry of Science and Technology of China

description: The Natural Object Dataset-MEG (NOD-MEG) provides magnetoencephalography data collected from subjects viewing naturalistic stimuli from ImageNet. This dataset is part of the larger Natural Object Dataset (NOD) that integrates MEG, EEG (ds005811), and fMRI (ds004496) data from the same subjects, enabling investigation of neural mechanisms underlying object recognition with high temporal resolution. The MEG component complements the fMRI data's high spatial resolution, facilitating exploration of neural activation patterns across both stimuli and individual differences.
methods_description: MEG data were collected from subjects viewing naturalistic stimuli images from ImageNet. Raw MEG data are stored in BIDS format with multiple sessions per subject. Preprocessing was performed using MNE (version 1.7.1), with preprocessed full time series and epoched data available in derivatives directories.
